This folder contains third-party JavaScript libraries used for documentation rendering.
All libraries are free open-source software.

=== marked.js v12.0.0 ===
License: MIT
Copyright (c) 2018+, MarkedJS
Source: https://github.com/markedjs/marked

=== mermaid.js v10.6.1 ===
License: MIT
Copyright (c) 2014-2024 Mermaid contributors
Source: https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid

=== highlight.js v11.9.0 (bundled with selected languages) ===
License: BSD-3-Clause
Copyright (c) 2006-2024 Ivan Sagalaev and contributors
Source: https://github.com/highlightjs/highlight.js
Languages included: csharp, json, xml, bash, yaml, javascript, css, plaintext

=== github-dark.min.css (highlight.js theme) ===
Part of highlight.js package, same BSD-3-Clause license.
